creator: freebsd@marino.st
text:
cl_ext.h was rerolled.

=> cl_ext.h doesn't seem to exist in /usr/distfiles/opencl.

fetch: http://www.khronos.org/registry/cl/api/1.2/cl_ext.h: size mismatch: expected 11540, actual 13646

fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/opencl/cl_ext.h: size mismatch: expected 11540, actual 9951
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
